prompts.name: No Visible Text
prompts.text: Avoid adding visible text, letters, captions, labels, logos, or signs unless the prompt specifically asks for them.

prompts.name: Clean Signage
prompts.text: If signs are present, keep them visually simple and avoid unreadable or garbled lettering.

prompts.name: Blank Book Pages
prompts.text: If books or papers appear, keep pages mostly blank or filled with indistinct texture rather than readable text.

prompts.name: No Watermark
prompts.text: Avoid watermark-like marks, signatures, social media handles, creator names, or artificial branding.

prompts.name: No Random Symbols
prompts.text: Avoid random letters, broken symbols, fake UI text, or scattered typography that distracts from the image.

prompts.name: Decorative Symbols Only
prompts.text: Allow decorative runes or symbols only when they are part of a magical or ornamental design, not random readable text.

prompts.name: Clean UI Elements
prompts.text: If interface elements are included, keep them simple, abstract, and visually coherent without requiring readable words.

prompts.name: Abstract Posters
prompts.text: If posters appear in the background, keep their designs abstract or image-based rather than filled with text.

prompts.name: No Product Labels
prompts.text: Avoid product labels or brand markings on objects unless specifically requested.

prompts.name: Decorative Tattoos
prompts.text: If tattoos are included, make them decorative shapes, patterns, or symbolic motifs rather than readable writing.

prompts.name: Newspaper Texture
prompts.text: If newspapers appear, use blurred column-like texture without readable headlines or detailed text.

prompts.name: Screen Glow Without Text
prompts.text: If screens appear, use glow, shapes, icons, or abstract interface detail rather than legible text.

prompts.name: Wordless Banners
prompts.text: If banners or flags appear, use colors, crests, or symbols instead of written words.

prompts.name: Text-Free Background
prompts.text: Keep the background free of unwanted text so the subject and composition remain clean.

prompts.name: Text Only When Requested
prompts.text: Only include readable text when the user explicitly asks for specific words or typography.
